name: Magic Clothing TF
description:
Your life is about to take a sudden change when one day, your mother one day purchases a tub of mysterious laundry powder. You're the one who discovers that by wearing the clothes of another person after being washed by the laundry powder, your respective body part will change to match the article.

For example, if you wore your little sister's socks, your feet would morph into your sister's feet to fit the socks.

Where it came from and what happens afterwards is a decision totally up to you!
creator: justforhorny
